scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/claimtrace run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build:vercel && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && cp -r artifacts/claimtrace/dist/public/. .vercel/output/static/ && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.vercel/output/config.json', JSON.stringify({version:3,routes:[{src:'/assets/(.*)',headers:{'cache-control':'public, max-age=31536000, immutable'},continue:true},{handle:'filesystem'},{src:'/api/(.*)',dest:'/api/index'},{src:'/(.*)',dest:'/index.html'}]}))"
